description: Triggers for creative ideation before implementation for features, names, concepts

queries.query: Brainstorm feature ideas for our mobile productivity app
Generate creative name ideas for our new SaaS product
I need a brainstorm session before we start building the onboarding flow
What are 10 different ways we could approach this product problem?
Help me ideate on how to differentiate our product from Slack
Brainstorm tagline and positioning concepts for our B2B tool
I want to explore multiple creative directions before committing to one
Generate a wide range of ideas for our employee engagement program
Brainstorm how we could solve the user onboarding drop-off problem
Give me divergent ideas for our company hackathon theme
Write the code for the onboarding feature we discussed
Implement a new user registration flow with email verification
Fix the bug in our checkout component
Create a detailed technical specification for the search feature
Set up a React project with TypeScript
Write a SQL query to find users who churned last month
Help me write a cover letter for a PM role
Transcribe this meeting recording
Analyze our product metrics for Q1
Create an implementation plan for the dashboard redesign
